name: predictable-revenue
description: Build a scalable outbound B2B sales process with specialized roles (SDR, AE, CSM). Use when the user mentions "outbound sales", "Cold Calling 2.0", "prospecting emails", "sales pipeline", "SDR process", "B2B SaaS sales", "sales development", or "pipeline velocity". Also trigger when setting up a sales team from scratch, designing cold email sequences, or building qualification frameworks to improve close rates. Covers lead generation, qualification frameworks, and separating prospecting from clo
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 一套可扩展的B2B对外销售流程框架，适合从零搭建团队或提升成单率。它通过分离找线索与签单的职责，解决冷开发效率低、销售漏斗转化慢的难题，让团队分工更专业高效。
